text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah! I found it at last! This will make the perfect present! Hrngh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it won't break off. It looks so cool too... I never saw an icicle as
big as a bear.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, I guess it'd melt anyway. Santa wouldn't choose that... Hm,
gotta start over. Something within... But not in my clothes. I didn't
find anything there.
Marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Kyahaha! Try to be smoother, Mayano! And do it more
marvelously! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Marvelously? You got it! Saucy-licious maverick snowball, taking
off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Eek! That's cold! But now I'm all hot! ☆ How strange and fantastic! ★
Winter is truly marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It is getting hot! I need to take my coat off. ♪ Hahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You two...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Oguri! Hi, Oguri! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: A marvelous day to you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hello. What are you doing? Did you come all the way out here for a
snowball fight?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No, no! If you really wanna know... we're looking for a miracle!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You are?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ 'Tis the season that's most full of them! ☆ Sparkly ones,
exciting ones, and especially marvelous ones! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We managed to find this place using Marvey's marvelous sixth
sense and my instincts. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And would ya look at all the snow! It's more fun than we could wish
for! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano & Marvelous
text_block_list.text: Yippee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So that's it. Both your intuitions are incredible. You're right that there
are lots of miracles on snowy mountains. I just saw an icicle as big as a
grizzly.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! That's super awesome! And we just saw a giant sleigh that
crashed down!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A sleigh! That's a must-have in winter! One of those can carry so much
food! Where was it? I want to see too!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: We'd be happy to show you, but are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I see a hazy purplish blue around you... Is it food? The sparkles in it
look so tasty I'm getting dizzy. ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tasty-looking sparkles? It can't be snow. That's not food. I got in
trouble once for eating it like shaved ice...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you got scolded, huh? No, wait! What Marvey's asking is if you're
in some kinda trouble!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's right! Actually...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I see now. So you wanna be Santa? ♪ That's so sweet! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know what the right present would be... I just can't imagine
one, no matter how hard I think.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... ☆ Say, Oguri! That outfit you're wearing...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my fans gave this to me as a present. They put all this effort into
it to give me an extra boost...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can really feel their hearts in it. That's why... I have to give a present
back, something only I can give.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I think I might know what to do! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ah, is it super sparkly and marvelous? I think we thought of the same
thing! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nice, Marvey! It really is the only option here, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Something marvelous? What could that be? You've got to tell
me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The thing you just have to do is... you've gotta really become Santa! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But... what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mayano & Marvelous
text_block_list.text: Exactly what you think! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurrrgle...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my stomach... It must be dinner time soon. That means the
party's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You two! Thanks for the help! I'll try to become Santa and see what
happens!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Marvey. I've got a proposal for you.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ah! Me too! It'd be really fun if we... follow Oguri, right? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know it, Marvey! Change of flight path! We're going after
Oguri—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tweet, tweet...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hngh! I'm coooold!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Wooow... ☆ It's snowiiiing! ★
